stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Regarding the speeds shown in the annex, which of the following answers is correct?

options.a: The rate of descent would be greatest at speed F.
options.b: The aeroplane would decelerate in straight and level flight at speed D.
options.c: The angle of descent would be greater at speed C than at speed B.
options.d: The maximum angle of climb would be achieved at speed C.
